description: Multiple errors compose in DECLARATION ORDER (§55.12). <pw req length(>=8) pattern(/[A-Z]/)> on a non-empty "abc": req passes, then length AND pattern both fail → errors = [.LengthFailed, .PatternMismatch] in the source-declared order (length before pattern). <errors of=@signup.pw all/> renders both (2 .scrml-error).
rationale: §55.12: 'Validators on a single cell COMPOSE... Order of error tags matches the source-code declaration order.' A non-empty value that fails two predicates yields both tags, ordered by declaration (req did not short-circuit because it passed).
